# Roundo

Bakbak vendors the Roundo v2.0 variable webfont from the official Fontshare
kit so the desktop app can render its interface without a network request.

- Project: <https://www.fontshare.com/fonts/roundo>
- Upstream repository: <https://github.com/itfoundry/roundo>
- Downloaded kit: `https://api.fontshare.com/v2/fonts/download/kit?f[]=roundo@1`
- Family version: 2.0
- Included file: `public/fonts/roundo/Roundo-Variable.woff2`
- Supported weight range: 200–700, upright only
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1 in `OFL.txt`
- Downloaded kit SHA-256: `4c5c18ce14b4a5296d2db8bf9ac11d6596ce3822f92141fb0cb7158ba73e6049`
- WOFF2 SHA-256: `74481965a428478803e36f6aaf21d163c36c5c8fc2cb27029dfbf1f9fb6f5a65`
- License SHA-256: `2d956ec546e8726ad541ca01dca5ec22f2eb1c1fca4b1c0395c4eefd8993b47b`

The generic sans-serif fallback remains available for glyphs outside Roundo's
documented Latin and Gurmukhi coverage.
